title: Edit PhaseDetail.tsx with transitions, freeze state logic, and draft resync
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseDetail.tsx

Read the existing file. Make these changes:

1. Add VALID_TRANSITIONS map (same as in state.ts):
const VALID_TRANSITIONS: Record<PhaseStatus, PhaseStatus[]> = {
  DraftSpec: ['SpecApproved'],
  SpecApproved: ['PRDAttached', 'DraftSpec'],
  PRDAttached: ['ReadyForBuild', 'SpecApproved'],
  ReadyForBuild: ['Accepted', 'ReworkRequired'],
  Accepted: ['Closed'],
  ReworkRequired: ['DraftSpec', 'PRDAttached'],
  Closed: [],
};

2. Filter the status dropdown to only show current status + valid transitions:
const allowedStatuses = [draft.status, ...(VALID_TRANSITIONS[draft.status] || [])];
Only render options for allowedStatuses.

3. If phase.freezeState is Locked, disable ALL form inputs except the freeze state dropdown itself. Show a banner: Phase is locked. Change freeze state to edit.

4. If phase.freezeState is FrozenDownstream, disable the status dropdown. Show note: Status locked due to frozen downstream phases.

5. Add useEffect to resync draft from props: useEffect(() => setDraft({...phase}), [phase.id, phase.updatedAt])

Commit.
